subcodes.first_line: O Persian handmaiden of the Lord God! For a time thou wert privileged to attain unto the sacred dust of the Wronged One of the horizons and His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز پارسی حضرت یزدان مدتی بود که بتراب خاک پاک مظلوم آفاق فائز و درگاه
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @call to action, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
